name: Jeff's Pizza Sauce
recipeIngredient: 56 oz Italian Plum tomatoes (2-28 oz cans)
recipeInstructions:
If you don't like small bits of tomato in the sauce, puree the whole tomatoes in a blender first. Otherwise, chop them as the mixture cooks.
Mix all ingredients except oregano in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Simmer for 30 minutes, then stir in the oregano.
Cook an additional 15 minutes.
Sauce is best if cooked and chilled overnight in the refrigerator.
To Use: Prepare basic pizza dough. Spoon sauce onto the crust to the edges of the crust, cover with a thick layer of mozzarella cheese. Top with meat and vegetable toppings, then cover again with mozzarella and parmesan (or romano) cheeses. All cheeses are best if freshly grated.
